DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  no Authorization header
        WHEN   I GET /rest/v1/{realm}/document/{uid}
        THEN   the response status is 401 Unauthorized

        This verifies that the API gateway enforces authentication and does
        not expose data to unauthenticated callers.
NAME: TC-EC-01: Request without Authorization header returns 401

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a POST /file?synchronous=true request
        WHEN  the response is 201 Created
        THEN  the response body conforms to the FileSummary schema in swagger.json
NAME: TC-CT-02: FileSummary response conforms to OpenAPI schema

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a valid ID card image (recto + verso)
        WHEN  POST /document?synchronous=true
        THEN  201 Created with a non-empty UID string
NAME: TC-HP-01: Create document returns 201 with a UID

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  a request without authentication
        WHEN   the API returns 401
        THEN   the response body is valid JSON (not HTML or plain text)

        Structured error responses are essential for client-side error handling.
        An HTML error page or plain-text message would break API consumers.
NAME: TC-CT-05: Error response for unauthorised request is structured

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN the swagger.json URL
        WHEN  I fetch it
        THEN  it returns valid JSON with required OpenAPI fields
NAME: TC-CT-01: OpenAPI spec is fetchable and valid JSON

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  a valid authenticated request
        WHEN   I GET /document with a UID that does not exist
        THEN   the response status is 404 Not Found

        This verifies that the API does not return 200 with empty data
        or 500 for unknown UIDs — a common API design smell.
NAME: TC-EC-04: GET non-existent document returns 404

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  a valid authenticated request
        WHEN   I DELETE /document with a UID that does not exist
        THEN   the response status is 404 Not Found
NAME: TC-EC-05: Delete non-existent document returns 404

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis
        WHEN  I read lastReport.info.documentNumber.value
        THEN  it equals 'X4RTBPFW4' (as printed on the specimen card)
NAME: TC-FA-03: Extracted document number = X4RTBPFW4

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis
        WHEN  I read lastReport.info.extra[] where key starts with MRZ_LINE
        THEN  MRZ line 3 contains 'MARTIN' and 'MAELYS'
NAME: TC-FA-06: MRZ lines are extracted and correct

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  an authenticated request
        WHEN   I POST /document/{uid}/check with a non-existent UID
        THEN   the response is 404 Not Found

        Ensures the analysis trigger endpoint validates resource existence
        before starting expensive processing.
NAME: TC-EC-08: Trigger check on non-existent document returns 404

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis on the specimen card
        WHEN  I read lastReport.globalStatus
        THEN  it equals 'OK' (document is valid)

        globalStatus values: OK = valid, KO = invalid/rejected
NAME: TC-FA-04: Document validity globalStatus = OK

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis report
        WHEN  I read lastReport.globalStatus
        THEN  it contains a recognised verdict: OK or KO

        globalStatus="OK"  → document is valid
        globalStatus="KO"  → document rejected
NAME: TC-HP-04: Analysis produces globalStatus verdict

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN an existing document
        WHEN  POST /document/{uid}/check?synchronous=false
        THEN  202 Accepted with a task/confirmation response

        NOTE: No DELETE in teardown — the API returns 409 Conflict when
        trying to delete a document while analysis is in progress.
        This is correct state-machine behaviour: the document is locked
        during processing. This is documented, not a bug.
NAME: TC-HP-02: Trigger analysis returns 202 Accepted

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  an authenticated request
        WHEN   I POST /document with a non-base64, non-image `data` value
        THEN   the response is a client error (4xx)

        The API must not accept clearly invalid image data and must not
        return 500 (which would indicate unhandled server-side exception).
NAME: TC-EC-07: Create document with invalid image data returns error

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis
        WHEN  I read lastReport.info.expirationDate.value
        THEN  it equals '11/02/2030'
        AND   expirationDate.year = 2030 (document is not expired)
NAME: TC-FA-05: Expiration date = 11/02/2030

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis report
        WHEN  I read lastReport.persons[0].identityData.firstNames.values
        THEN  the list contains 'Maëlys-Gaëlle' and 'Marie'
NAME: TC-FA-02: Extracted first names contain Maëlys-Gaëlle and Marie

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a POST /document?synchronous=true request
        WHEN  the response is 201 Created
        THEN  the response body conforms to DocumentSummary schema
NAME: TC-CT-03: DocumentSummary response conforms to OpenAPI schema

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  a token request with an incorrect client_secret
        WHEN   I POST to the OAuth2 token endpoint
        THEN   the response status is 401 Unauthorized
        AND    the body contains an error field

        Validates that the auth server correctly rejects bad credentials.
        This is a separate test from API-level auth because it targets the
        OpenID Connect layer.
NAME: TC-EC-03: Token endpoint with wrong credentials returns 401

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis report
        THEN  lastReport.persons contains at least one person
        AND   lastReport.checks contains validation results

        The core value of IDcheck is data extraction. An empty persons list
        on a readable ID card signals an OCR or classification regression.
NAME: TC-HP-05: Analysis extracts identity data fields

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a completed analysis report
        WHEN  I read lastReport.persons[0].identityData.lastName.value
        THEN  the value equals 'MARTIN' (as printed on the specimen card)
NAME: TC-FA-01: Extracted last name = MARTIN

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN a submitted document with analysis triggered
        WHEN  polling until lastAnalysisStatus == OK
        THEN  the document is complete and lastReport is populated

        The IDcheck API uses lastAnalysisStatus="OK" (not a "FINAL" state)
        to signal that analysis is complete and results are available.
NAME: TC-HP-03: Analysis completes with lastAnalysisStatus=OK

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  an Authorization header with a forged/invalid Bearer token
        WHEN   I GET /rest/v1/{realm}/document/{uid}
        THEN   the response status is 401 Unauthorized

        An invalid JWT should fail signature verification at the gateway.
NAME: TC-EC-02: Request with invalid Bearer token returns 401

DESCRIPTION:
GIVEN  an authenticated request
        WHEN   I POST /document with an empty JSON body {}
        THEN   the response is a client error (4xx)

        An empty body lacks the required `type` field. The API should
        reject it with 400 Bad Request or 422 Unprocessable Entity.
NAME: TC-EC-06: Create document with empty body returns 400
TC-CT-04: Full DocumentResponse conforms to OpenAPI schema after analysis
